title: Settings Custom Swipe Sensor
scenario: Custom Swipe Sensor settings section is present in Device Settings for Poly Voyager Free 60, 60+, and 20 with values matching design spec
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap on the connected Poly Voyager Free device (e.g., VF60, VF60+, or VF20) to open Device Settings.
Scroll down to locate the 'Custom Swipe Sensor' settings section.
Verify that the 'Custom Swipe Sensor' section is present.
Tap on 'Custom Swipe Sensor' to expand/view its options.
Check that all available settings and their values match the design specification (e.g., swipe gestures for volume, track control, ANC/Transparency, etc.).
expected: The 'Custom Swipe Sensor' settings section is present in Device Settings for supported Poly Voyager Free devices (VF60, VF60+, VF20), and all settings and values match the design specification.
